High-level map for the share and collaboration area:
- excalidraw-app/share/ contains the app-level share dialog and platform-specific share handling
- excalidraw-app/data/ contains collaboration link helpers and room/share link data helpers

- app-level and package-level tests cover share, collaboration, and command/search behavior
